---
title: "Short, descriptive project name (3–5 words). Can be the preserve/client + topic, or the method + system."
subtitle: "One phrase that clarifies scope or novelty (hook)"
description: "Lead with the deliverable, then the ecological question or management need it addressed (1–2 sentences)"
date: "2024-04-01"
# image: Square crop. Prefer a figure, map, or graphic from the project over a generic wildlife photo.
# categories: 3–6 tags; Include at least one method tag, one topic tag, and one deliverable tag.

format: html
---

<!-- <a class="button-teal" href="https://github.com/morethangray/ltnc_cameras">Repository</a> -->

### Project overview

(2–4 sentences)

*Who was the client, what was the system, and what was the core question or need? This sets context before getting into methods.*

### Objectives

- Objective 1
- Objective 2
- Objective 3

*What specific questions or tasks did the project address? These should map to the deliverables.*

### Approach

(short paragraph)

*Methods and tools used. Mention data types, analytical frameworks, and any noteworthy technical choices (e.g., reproducible pipeline, multi-state model, collaborative design process).*

### Key findings or deliverables

- Finding 1
- Finding 2
- Finding 3

*What were the results, outputs, or recommendations? Be specific enough to be credible; avoid over-summarizing.*

### Links

(as applicable)

🔗 Interactive report

📄 PDF download

📁 Public repository

📑 Publication

### Citation

*Full citation in consistent format.*
